src.main.py:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os
import sys
import json
from analyzer.project_analyzer import analyze_project
from analyzer.pytest_runner import run_pytest
from analyzer.linter_runner import run_linter
from analyzer.report_generator import generate_report, save_report

def main(project_dir=None):
    if project_dir is None:
        project_dir = os.getcwd()
    
    print(f'Analyzing Python project in: {project_dir}')
    
    analysis = analyze_project(project_dir)
    print('Project analysis complete.')
    
    test_results = run_pytest(project_dir)
    print('Pytest execution complete.')
    
    lint_results = run_linter(project_dir)
    print('Linter execution complete.')
    
    report = generate_report(analysis, test_results, lint_results)
    
    print(json.dumps(report, indent=2))
    
    save_report(report)
    print('Report saved to fixer_report.json')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        main(sys.argv[1])
    else:
        main()
